name: 100 Rep Daily KB Challenge (@gymfiesta)
description: 100 reps of 6 kettlebell exercises — around-the-body passes, side swings, upright rows, swings, tricep extensions, and bent-over horn rows. Each block has randomized variants so it stays fresh daily. Do it with a light bell. High volume, full body, posture and conditioning focused.

exercises.notes: Stay low in a wide stance, pass the bell in a figure-8 between legs. 4x25 = 100 total.
Circle the bell around your head. Alternate directions each set. 4x25 = 100 total.
Pass KB around your hips/body. Alternate directions. 4x25 = 100 total.
Seated, feet up, rotate side to side with the bell. 4x25 = 100 total.
Hold bell in one hand, side bend away then back. Switch sides each set. 4x25 = 100 total.
Side-to-side swings across the body. 4x25 = 100 total. Use core rotation.
Explosive hip snap, pull bell to chin height. 4x25 = 100 total.
Slow controlled circles around head. Great for shoulder mobility. 4x25 = 100 total.
Strict pull — elbows high, shrug at top, no hip snap. 4x25 = 100 total.
Slow hinge, feel the hamstring stretch, squeeze glutes at top. 4x25 = 100 total.
Wide stance, toes out, hinge to grab bell, drive through heels. 4x25 = 100 total.
Full depth, chest up. Light bell, high reps — legs and glutes. 4x25 = 100 total.
Standard two-handed swings. Squeeze glutes hard at top. 4x25 = 100 total.
Tricep extension then circle into a halo. Smooth transitions. 4x25 = 100 total.
Lie on floor, press bell up. Alternate arms each set. 4x25 = 100 total.
Hold by horns overhead, lower behind head, extend. Elbows stay close. 4x25 = 100 total.
Two KBs on floor, hinged over, alternating explosive rows. Anti-rotation. 4x25 = 100 total.
Hinged, one bell, alternate arms each rep. Pull past ribs. 4x25 = 100 total.
Both hands on horns, bent over, row to hips and extend. 4x25 = 100 total.

tips: Use a LIGHT kettlebell — this is 600 total reps
Each block has a 40% chance to swap in a different exercise — keeps it fresh daily
Break each 100 into 4x25 or 5x20 as needed
Designed to be done daily — not a max effort session
Focus on form over speed at this volume
Gorilla rows need 2 bells — sub alternating rows if you only have one
Credit: @gymfiesta (base workout), variants added for daily variety
